description_long: This is a portable stereo sound system mounted on a tall, adjustable tripod stand. The main speaker unit is box-shaped with a visible front-facing speaker cone and a protective grille, while the rear and sides are plain with a recessed handle for easy transport. The tripod stand features three sturdy legs that spread outward for stability, and the central pole supports the speaker at an elevated height. The speaker enclosure appears to be made of durable plastic or composite material, with metal components for the stand and grille. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or indoor urban events such as street performances, public announcements, or gatherings. The object is predominantly black, with a matte finish and minimal decorative elements.
description: A black, boxy stereo speaker mounted on a tall, three-legged tripod stand, featuring a front grille and a recessed handle on the back. The design is sturdy and functional, ideal for urban events or public use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille and central speaker cone, with the tripod legs symmetrically spread.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the recessed handle and the plain back panel of the speaker.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying the back panel and handle, with the tripod legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view similar to view 1, showing the handle and the side of the speaker.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille has a fine mesh pattern with small, evenly spaced perforations, providing protection and sound transparency.
